title: Junior PHP Developer
points: Planned, coded and deployed web applications using PHP, MySQL and JavaScript.
Enhanced functionality by implementing PHP solutions and optimizing server-side code.
Reduced page load times by optimizing front-end code in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Developed back-end components to connect applications with web services.
Integrated third-party APIs (IndiaMART, Razorpay, etc.) for seamless system communication.
Maintained version control using Git, ensuring smooth team collaboration.
Configured and deployed REST APIs; integrated with external third-party services.
Developed user-friendly web forms with validation and error handling.
Managed all projects using Git version control.
